request_params.name: symbol
request_params.description: Trading pair

request_params.name: marginMode
request_params.description: Margin mode 1: Cross Mode 3: Isolated Mode The marginMode must be set to the account's current mode.

request_params.name: longLeverage
request_params.description: Long position leverage In Cross Mode, must be identical to shortLeverage.

request_params.name: shortLeverage
request_params.description: Short position leverage In Cross Mode, must be identical to longLeverage.

request_params.name: coinId
request_params.description: Collateral ID Basic Crypto Information Default is 2 (USDT)

request_params.name: isolatedPositionId
request_params.description: Isolated margin position ID Get the isolatedPositionId

request_params.name: collateralAmount
request_params.description: Collateral amount positive means increase, and negative means decrease

request_params.name: >> is_set_taker_maker_fee_discount
request_params.required: Whether to apply separate fee discounts for takers and makers

request_params.name: >> is_set_taker_maker_fee_discount
request_params.required: Whether to apply separate fee discounts for takers and makers

request_params.name: > createOrderRateLimitPerMinute
request_params.required: Order creation rate limit per minute

request_params.name: > crossSymbol
request_params.required: When marginMode=CROSS, represents the symbol associated with cross margin mode. Null in other cases.

request_params.name: > isolated_position_id
request_params.required: When marginMode=ISOLATED, represents the position ID associated with isolated margin. 0 in other cases.

request_params.name: > cum_position_open_long_amount
request_params.required: Accumulated collateral amount for long position openings

request_params.name: > cum_position_open_short_amount
request_params.required: Accumulated collateral amount for short position openings

request_params.name: > cum_position_close_long_amount
request_params.required: Accumulated collateral amount for long position closings

request_params.name: > cum_position_close_short_amount
request_params.required: Accumulated collateral amount for short position closings

request_params.name: > cum_position_fill_fee_amount
request_params.required: Accumulated trading fees for filled orders

request_params.name: positionId
request_params.description: Isolated margin position ID

request_params.name: autoAppendMargin
request_params.description: Whether to enable automatic margin call

request_params.name: side
request_params.required: Position direction such as LONG or SHORT

request_params.name: margin_mode
request_params.required: Margin mode of current position SHARED: Cross Mode ISOLATED: Isolated Mode

request_params.name: separated_mode
request_params.required: Current position's separated mode COMBINED: Combined mode SEPARATED: Separated mode

request_params.name: separated_open_order_id
request_params.required: Opening order ID of separated position

request_params.name: is_auto_append_isolated_margin
request_params.required: Whether the auto-adding of funds for the isolated margin is enabled (only for isolated mode)

request_params.name: cum_open_fee
request_params.required: Accumulated fees paid for opened positions

request_params.name: cum_close_fee
request_params.required: Accumulated fees paid for closing positions

request_params.name: created_match_sequence_id
request_params.required: Matching engine sequence ID at creation

request_params.name: updated_match_sequence_id
request_params.required: Matching engine sequence ID at last update

request_params.name: liquidatePrice
request_params.required: Estimated liquidation price If the value = 0, it means the position is at low risk and there is no liquidation price at this time

request_params.name: coin
request_params.description: Currency name

request_params.name: symbol
request_params.description: Trading pair

request_params.name: businessType
request_params.description: Business type deposit : Deposit withdraw : Withdrawal transfer_in : Transfer between different accounts (in) transfer_out : Transfer between different accounts (out) margin_move_in : Collateral transferred within the same account due to opening/closing positions, manual/auto addition margin_move_out : Collateral transferred out within the same account due to opening/closing positions, manual/auto addition position_open_long : Collateral change from opening long positions (buying decreases collateral) position_open_short : Collateral change from opening short positions (selling increases collateral) position_close_long : Collateral change from closing long positions (selling increases collateral) position_close_short : Collateral change from closing short positions (buying decreases collateral) position_funding : Collateral change from position funding fee settlement order_fill_fee_income : Order fill fee income (specific to fee account) order_liquidate_fee_income : Order liquidation fee income (specific to fee account) start_liquidate : Start liquidation finish_liquidate : Finish liquidation order_fix_margin_amount : Compensation for liquidation loss tracking_follow_pay : Copy trading payment, pre-deducted from followers after position closing if profitable tracking_system_pre_receive : Pre-received commission, commission system account receives pre-deducted amount from followers tracking_follow_back : Copy trading commission refund tracking_trader_income : Lead trader income tracking_third_party_share : Profit sharing (shared by lead trader with others)

request_params.name: startTime
request_params.description: Start timestamp Unit: milliseconds

request_params.name: endTime
request_params.description: End timestamp Unit: milliseconds

request_params.name: limit
request_params.description: Return record limit, default: 20 Minimum: 1 Maximum: 100

response_params.name: transferReason
response_params.description: Transfer Reason UNKNOWN_TRANSFER_REASON: Unknown transfer reason USER_TRANSFER: User manual transfer INCREASE_CONTRACT_CASH_GIFT: Increase contract cash gift REDUCE_CONTRACT_CASH_GIFT: Reduce contract cash gift REFUND_WXB_DISCOUNT_FEE: Refund WXB discount fee

response_params.description: Margin mode of current position SHARED: Cross Mode ISOLATED: Isolated Mode

response_params.name: separated_mode
response_params.description: Current position's separated mode COMBINED: Combined mode SEPARATED: Separated mode

response_params.name: separated_open_order_id
response_params.description: Opening order ID of separated position

response_params.name: is_auto_append_isolated_margin
response_params.description: Whether the auto-adding of funds for the isolated margin is enabled (only for isolated mode)

response_params.name: cum_close_fee
response_params.description: Accumulated fees paid for closing positions

response_params.description: Estimated liquidation price If the value = 0, it means the position is at low risk and there is no liquidation price at this time

request_params.name: symbol
request_params.description: Trading pair. If not provided, all positions will be closed at market price

response_params.description: Whether the position was successfully closed

request_params.name: symbol
request_params.description: Trading pair

request_params.name: orderId
request_params.description: OrderId

request_params.name: startTime
request_params.description: The record start time for the query Unix millisecond timestamp

request_params.name: endTime
request_params.description: The end time of the record for the query Unix millisecond timestamp

request_params.name: limit
request_params.description: Limit number default 100 max 100

request_params.name: page
request_params.description: Page number  default 0

response_params.name: status
response_params.description: Order status pending: The order has been submitted for matching, but the result has not been processed yet. open: The order has been processed by the matching engine (order placed), and may have been partially filled. filled: The order has been completely filled [final state]. canceling: The order is being canceled. canceled: The order has been canceled. It may have been partially filled. [final state]. untriggered: The conditional order has not been triggered yet.

response_params.name: type
response_params.description: Order type open_long: Open long open_short: Open short close_long: Close long close_short: Close short offset_liquidate_long: Reduce position, close long offset_liquidate_short: Reduce position, close short agreement_close_long: Agreement close long agreement_close_short: Agreement close short burst_liquidate_long: Liquidation close long burst_liquidate_short: Liquidation close short

response_params.name: order_type
response_params.description: Order type normal: Regular limit order, valid until canceled. postOnly: Maker-only order fok: Fill or kill, must be completely filled or canceled immediately. ioc: Immediate or cancel, fill as much as possible and cancel the remaining.

response_params.name: type
response_params.description: Order Type: 1. Open long. 2: Open short. 3: Close long. 4: Close short. 5: Partial close long. 6: Partial close short. 7: Auto-deleveraging (close long). 8: Auto-deleveraging (close short). 9: Liquidation (close long). 10. Liquidation (close short).

response_params.name: order_type
response_params.description: Order type: 0: Normal order. 1: Post-only. 2: Fill-Or-Kill (FOK) order. 3: Immediate-Or-Cancel (IOC) order.
